allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/hedra_openapi.json'\)\); paths=d.get\('paths',{}\); rt=[p for p in paths if 'livekit' in p.lower\(\) or 'realtime' in p.lower\(\) or 'session' in p.lower\(\)]; print\('realtime/livekit/session paths:'\); [print\(' ',p,list\(paths[p].keys\(\)\)\) for p in rt]; print\('\\\\ninfo:', d.get\('info',{}\)\); print\('\\\\ntotal paths:', len\(paths\)\)")
